title: verbena pulchella var. clavellata
intro: Verbena pulchella var. clavellata, also known as Purple Verbena or Pink Verbena, is a fragrant, flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Verbena pulchella var. clavellata include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and perfumery due to its sweet, fruity fragrance.
